reviews.comment:
No me quisieron cargar 5 litros de nafta porque no tenían actualizados los precios, aunque tenía el auto en reserva. Me trataron muy mal y tuve que hacer 70km en reserva gracias a ellos. De los peores

(Translated by Google)
They wouldn't fill me up with 5 liters of gas because they didn't have the updated prices, even though I had the car in reserve. They treated me very badly, and I had to drive 70 km in reserve thanks to them. One of the worst.
